k01: Kimchi-jjigae, a bubbling spicy red Korean stew with sliced fermented kimchi, white tofu cubes, pork belly slices, and green onion in a black earthenware pot
k02: Doenjang-jjigae, a hearty Korean soybean paste stew in a dark earthenware pot with soft tofu cubes, zucchini slices, mushrooms, and clams in rich brown broth
k03: Jeyuk-bokkeum, stir-fried sliced pork belly in shiny deep-red gochujang sauce with green onion and cabbage on a white plate

k08: Galbi-tang, a clear beef rib soup with tender long beef short ribs, clear broth, glass noodles, and green onion in a large white bowl

s21: Egg sandwich, a soft sandwich with a thick layer of creamy egg salad filling between soft white or whole-grain bread slices
s22: BLT sandwich, a classic sandwich with crispy bacon, green lettuce, ripe tomato slices, and mayo between toasted white bread
s23: Yogurt bowl, a smooth white yogurt bowl topped with fresh mixed berries, granola clusters, honey drizzle, and mint garnish
s24: Granola, a bowl of crunchy golden granola clusters with dried fruits and nuts served with milk or yogurt in a white bowl
s25: Convenience store salad, a Korean convenience store pre-packaged salad with mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, corn, and dressing in a clear container
s26: Kongnamul-guk, a simple Korean bean sprout soup with crunchy white bean sprouts, garlic, green onion, and clear anchovy broth in a bowl
s27: Samgak-gimbap set, a convenience store meal set with two triangular seaweed rice balls and a small side dish arranged on a tray
s28: Sausage bokkeumbap, fried rice with sliced Vienna sausage coins, peas, egg, and soy sauce, stir-fried in a hot pan with green onion
s29: Dubu-bap, a Korean simple tofu rice dish with pan-fried tofu pieces over white rice, drizzled with soy sauce and sesame oil
s30: Convenience store udon, a Korean convenience store heated udon with thick white noodles in a mild dashi broth in a plastic container
s31: Naengdong bokkeumbap, Korean frozen fried rice heated in a pan or microwave, golden with egg and vegetable bits mixed throughout
m01: Samgyeopsal, Korean grilled pork belly strips sizzling on a tabletop grill, golden-brown with rendered fat, served with lettuce wraps and garlic
m02: Chicken, Korean fried chicken with a golden crispy crust, either plain or glazed in sweet-spicy sauce, piled on a serving tray with pickled radish
m03: Gopchang, Korean grilled beef small intestines on a tabletop charcoal grill, charred and chewy with a rich fatty aroma, served with sesame salt
m04: Hoe-deopbap, a Korean raw fish rice bowl with colorful thinly sliced raw fish pieces, cucumber, radish, and sesame oil over white rice with gochujang
m05: Jokbal, Korean braised pig's feet, sliced to show the tender gelatinous skin and meat in soy-based dark glaze, served with shrimp paste and lettuce
m06: Bossam, Korean boiled pork belly slices, pale and tender, served with fermented kimchi, salted shrimp, oysters, and napa cabbage wraps
m07: Yangkkochi, Chinese-Korean skewered lamb kebabs with chunks of lamb on a stick, dusted with cumin and chili powder, charred on a grill
m08: Sogogi-gui, Korean grilled beef — sirloin or rib eye — sliced and grilled on a tabletop grill, served with sesame leaf and dipping sauce
m09: Makchang, Korean grilled large intestine on a charcoal grill, fatty and chewy with caramelized grill marks, served with salt and sesame oil
m10: Nakji-bokkeum, Korean spicy stir-fried baby octopus with tentacles in a fiery red gochujang sauce with onion and green onion on a hot plate
m11: Hangjeongsal, Korean grilled pork jowl, tender marbled slices with a buttery texture, grilling on a cast iron plate with golden sear marks
m12: Moksal-gui, Korean grilled pork neck slices with fat-marbled texture, sizzling on a tabletop grill plate, paired with garlic and perilla leaf
m13: Deungshim-gui, Korean grilled beef sirloin strips with rich marbling, grilling to golden-brown on a tabletop grill, served sliced on a plate
m14: Galbi-gui, Korean grilled beef short ribs on a charcoal grill, caramelized with sweet soy marinade glaze and charred grill marks
m15: Wang-galbi, Korean premium large-cut grilled beef short ribs, a massive thick rib with rich marbling, grilling on a tabletop grill
m16: Dakbal, Korean braised spicy chicken feet, bright red with fiery gochujang glaze, chewy and gelatinous, piled on a plate with sesame
m17: Yangnyeom-chicken, Korean fried chicken coated in a shiny deep-red sweet-spicy yangnyeom sauce, piled on a serving tray with pickled radish
m18: Fried chicken, Korean golden-brown crispy double-fried chicken pieces with an extra crunchy shell, piled in a tray or basket
m19: Duck grill, Korean grilled sliced duck meat with a slightly gamey aroma, grilling on a tabletop grill with sesame leaf and garlic accompaniments
m20: Haesanmul-jjim, a Korean steamed seafood medley with crab, shrimp, mussels, clams, and sea snails in a spicy orange chili sauce, served in a large bowl
m21: Lobster, a whole cooked lobster with a bright red shell and exposed white tail meat, served on a plate with butter and lemon
m22: Grilled shrimp, large whole shrimp grilled in shell with grill marks, charred and split open to show white flesh, served with garlic butter
m23: Jogae-jjim, a steamed Korean clam dish with open clams in a garlicky soy butter sauce, garnished with green onion and red chili in a wide pan
m24: Daege, a Korean snow crab, bright red when cooked, split open to reveal white crab leg meat, served on a plate with crab butter sauce
m25: Jeyuk-jeongsik, a Korean spicy stir-fried pork set meal with jeyuk-bokkeum over rice, served alongside a soup, kimchi, and side dishes on a tray
m26: Yakiniku, Japanese-style Korean BBQ with thinly sliced marinated beef and vegetables grilling on a tabletop grill with sesame dipping sauce
m27: Shabu-shabu, a Japanese hot pot with paper-thin beef slices dipped momentarily in clear dashi broth, served with napa cabbage and ponzu
m28: Buldak, Korean fire chicken, boneless chicken pieces in an intensely dark-red nuclear sauce, garnished with cheese and green onion in a pan
m29: Galbi-jjim, Korean braised beef short ribs slow-cooked in a savory-sweet soy sauce with chestnuts, dates, carrot, and radish in a deep pot
m30: Spicy galbi-jjim, Korean braised short ribs in a fiery red gochujang and chili sauce, with vegetables simmering in a wide earthenware pot
m31: Haemul-tang, a Korean spicy seafood stew with whole crab, shrimp, clams, and squid in a bright red chili broth, bubbling in a large clay pot
